message:
test(core): expand recorder invariants test suite — lifecycle, control, multi-pane (ft-oegrb.7.3)

Add 12 additional tests: lifecycle/control domain independence, egress gap
suppression, forward-reference causality detection, empty causality refs,
violation index accuracy, 1000-event multi-pane stress test, causal chain
validation, consecutive sequences, replay determinism edge cases.

43 tests total, all passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
